{{CargoOrgan
|name=Siphoning Mouthparts
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10838
|idx=43
|description=An organ unique to adult Lepidoptera, characterized by a beak that bends and extends to suck nectar, which can also suck the blood of living creatures!
|skill=
|hp=1330
|def=166
|atk=179
|rush=153
|gene1=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +10 W-tads
|gene2=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +10% Demon Chests
|gene3=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +10 W-tads
|gene4=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +10% Demon Chests
|gene7=Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +10% Demon Chests (Awakened)
|}}
